problem.title: Maximum Twin Sum of A Linked List

approaches.title: Copy Approach
approaches.summary: Copies all node values into a vector, then computes the maximum twin sum by pairing the first half with the reversed second half.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial implementation with full copying of node values.

revisions.commitComment: copy approach again, but less copying
revisions.rawCommitSubject: rust 2130: copy approach again, but less copying
revisions.shortChangeSummary: Optimized to reduce copying by using references during traversal.

approaches.title: Reverse Pointer Approach
approaches.summary: Uses a fast/slow pointer to find the middle, reverses the second half in-place, then pairs nodes from both halves.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Implements the reverse pointer technique to avoid extra space for copying.
